opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help — he can't breathe, his face has gone all tight and swollen and a bit purple over the last few hours, and he's coughing up streaks of blood. (Spouse calling; the patient can only get a few words out.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on fast tonight — his face and neck puffed up, he's gasping even sitting still and can't lie back at all, and there's blood in what he's coughing up.

symptom_narrative.onset: the breathing and the face swelling got really bad over the last 12 hours; the cough has been there for about 4 months
symptom_narrative.duration: cough about 4 months; the swelling and severe breathlessness in the last 12 hours, worsening over the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: face and neck feel tight and swollen and look a bit purple, a heavy pressure feeling in the head, breathing is fast and laboured, voice has gone hoarse and raspy, coughing up blood-streaked spit
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says he can't get enough air even sitting still and can't finish a sentence
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: face, neck and both arms look swollen; tight feeling across the chest with a deep dull ache
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting bolt upright helps a tiny bit; nothing really helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying back makes the breathing and head pressure much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: hoarse voice, blood-streaked sputum, swollen puffy face and arms, a deep dull chest ache not related to movement
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no episode like this before; the cough has been going on for months and slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot lie flat, cannot speak in full sentences, sitting rigidly upright in a chair

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with spouse, who made the call and is with him

objective_data_offered.value: oxygen level reads 91% on a home fingertip oximeter
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home fingertip device; patient is distressed and moving

objective_data_offered.value: face and neck look swollen and dusky/purple; puffiness around both eyes; both arms look swollen; prominent bulging veins visible on the neck; breathing looks fast and laboured
spouse says he is sitting bolt upright and refuses to lie back, is very distressed, sweaty and can only manage a few words at a time
tissues have fresh red blood in them from coughing
he has lost about 8 kg without trying over the past few months
he keeps using the blue reliever puffer but says it is doing absolutely nothing
